## Pull request checklist

- [ ] Schema 1.2 mechanic fields / 1.1+ map fields present on edited entries
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go run ./cmd/export -version 0.1.0` succeeds
- [ ] `go run ./scripts/lint_public_copy` passes
- [ ] Site builds: `cd site && npm run build`
- [ ] Opened from a feature branch (not direct push to `main`)

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
